---
title: ""
toc: false
---

::: hero
[BSc Sociology · University of Copenhagen]{.eyebrow}

# Multiple OLS & Fundamentals of Causal Inference

::: lead-text
Learn the skill at the heart of quantitative social science: **estimating causal
effects**. We combine multiple OLS regression with the logic of causal inference — from
randomized experiments to natural experiments, instrumental variables, and regression
discontinuity — using real sociological questions and hands-on R.
:::

:::

::: callout-start
**New here? Start with [About & setup](about.qmd).** Before the first session you need to install R,
RStudio, and a set of packages — please do this *in order*.
:::

## Your week, every week

```{=html}
<div class="step-grid">
  <div class="step"><span class="when">Wednesday 10–13</span>
    <span class="what">Lecture</span>
    <p>Two blocks with small in-class R exercises and a break. Bring your laptop.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="step"><span class="when">Friday</span>
    <span class="what">Exercise class</span>
    <p>A smaller setting with a tutor — bring your stats questions and practice R hands-on.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="step"><span class="when">Within two weeks</span>
    <span class="what">Absalon quiz</span>
    <p>A short weekly online quiz. Submit at least 10 of 14 to qualify for the exam.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Find your way

```{=html}
<div class="card-grid">
  <a class="kucard" href="lectures.html"><h3>Lectures</h3>
    <p>Slides and in-class R exercises, week by week.</p></a>
  <a class="kucard" href="exam.html"><h3>Exam &amp; quizzes</h3>
    <p>What it takes to pass: the weekly quizzes and the home assignment.</p></a>
  <a class="kucard" href="resources.html"><h3>Resources</h3>
    <p>Absalon, the textbooks' companion sites, and help getting started with R.</p></a>
  <a class="kucard" href="about.html"><h3>About &amp; setup</h3>
    <p>What the course is about, the team, and the R installation steps.</p></a>
</div>
```
